value.found_quote: Scan the QR code shown alongside the session URL to open it directly in the Claude app. ... In the Claude mobile app, tap **Code** in the navigation to reach the session list.
value.rationale: The page repeatedly references the Claude mobile app (for iOS and Android), including download links to the App Store and Google Play, confirming Anthropic offers a Claude mobile app. While the page is primarily about Remote Control (in research preview), the mobile app itself is presented as a generally available product with active download links.
